title: Pasuram 1
original:
śīronṟu tūppul tiruvēṅgaḍamuḍaiyān
tānē amaiyādō tāraṇiyil vāzvārkku
vānēṟa ppōmaḻavum vāzvu
‡ patti mudalām avaṭril ⋆
padi enakku kkūḍāmal ⋆
ettiśaiyum uzanṟōḍi ⋆
iḻaittu vizum kāgam pōl ⋆⋆
muttitarum nagar ēzil ⋆
mukkiyamām kacci tanil ⋆
attigiri aruḻāḻarkku ⋆
aḍaikkalam nān pugundēnē

title: Pasuram 2
original:
śaḍaimuḍiyan śadurmugan enṟu ⋆
ivar mudalām taram ellām ⋆
aḍaiya vinai ppayan āgi ⋆
azinduviḍum paḍi kaṇḍu ⋆⋆
kaḍi malarāḻ piriyāda ⋆
kacci nagar attigiri ⋆
iḍam uḍaiya aruḻāḻar ⋆
iṇai aḍigaḻ aḍaindēnē

title: Pasuram 3
original:
tandiraṅgaḻ vēṟinṟi ⋆
tamadu vazi aziyādu ⋆
mandiraṅgaḻ tammālum ⋆
maṭrum uḻḻa uraiyālum ⋆⋆
andaram kaṇḍaḍi paṇivār ⋆
ellārkkum aruḻ puriyum ⋆
śindura veṟpiṟaiyavanār ⋆
śīlam alladaṟiyēnē

title: Pasuram 4
original:
kāgam irākkadan mannar ⋆
kādali kattirabandu ⋆
nāgam aran ayan mudalā ⋆
nāganagarār tamakkum ⋆⋆
pōgam uyar vīḍu peṟa ⋆
pon aruḻ śeydamai kaṇḍu ⋆
nāgamalai nāyaganār ⋆
nal aḍi ppōdaḍaindēnē

title: Pasuram 5
original:
ugakkum avai ugandu ⋆
ugavā anaittum ozindu ⋆
uṟavu kuṇam miga ttuṇivu peṟa uṇarndu ⋆
viyan kāval ena varittu ⋆⋆
śagattil oru pugal illā ⋆
tavam aṟiyēn madiṭkacci ⋆
nagar kkaruṇai nādanai ⋆
nal aḍaikkalamāy aḍaindēnē
split_lines: uṟavu | kuṇam | miga | ttuṇivu | peṟa | uṇarndu

title: Pasuram 6
original:
aḻavuḍaiyār aḍaindārkkum ⋆
adan uraiyē koṇḍavarkkum ⋆
vaḻavurai tandavan aruḻē ⋆
manniya mā tavattōrkkum ⋆⋆
kaḻavozivār emar enna ⋆
iśaindavarkkum kāvalarām ⋆
tuḻava muḍi aruḻ varadar ⋆
tuvakkil enai vaittēnē

title: Pasuram 7
original:
umadaḍigaḻ aḍaiginṟēn enṟu ⋆
oru kāl uraittavarai ⋆
amaiyum ini enbavar pōl ⋆
añjal ena kkaram vaittu ⋆⋆
tamadanaittum avar tamakkum ⋆
vazaṅgiyum tām miga viḻaṅgum ⋆
amaivuḍaiya aruḻāḻar ⋆
aḍi iṇaiyai aḍaindēnē

title: Pasuram 8
original:
tiṇmai kuṟaiyāmaikkum ⋆
niṟaigaikkum tī vinaiyāl ⋆
uṇmai maṟavāmaikkum ⋆
uḻa madiyil ugakkaikkum ⋆⋆
taṇmai kaziyāmaikkum ⋆
tarikkaikkum taṇigaikkum ⋆
vaṇmaiyuḍai aruḻāḻar ⋆
vāśagaṅgaḻ maṟavēnē

title: Pasuram 9
original:
śurudi ninaivivai aṟiyum ⋆
tuṇivuḍaiyār tūy mozigaḻ ⋆
paridi madi āśiriyar ⋆
pāśuram śērndarukkaṇaṅgaḻ ⋆⋆
karudi oru teḻivāḻāl ⋆
kalakkam aṟuttattigiri ⋆
paridi madi nayanam uḍai ⋆
paraman aḍi paṇindēnē

title: Pasuram 10
original:
‡ tirumagaḻum tiruvaḍivum ⋆
tiruvaruḻum teḻ aṟivum ⋆
arumai ilāmaiyum uṟavum ⋆
aḻappariya aḍi araśum ⋆⋆
karumam azippaḻippamaippum ⋆
kalakkam ilā vagai ninṟa ⋆
aruḻ varadar nilai ilakkil ⋆
ambena nān amizndēnē

title: Pasuram 11
original:
‡ āṟu payan vēṟillā ⋆
aḍiyavargaḻ anaivarkkum ⋆
āṟum adan payanum ivai ⋆
oru kālum pala kālum ⋆⋆
āṟu payan enavē kaṇḍu ⋆
aruḻāḻar aḍi iṇai mēl ⋆
kūṟiya naṟkuṇa uraigaḻ ⋆
ivai pattum kōdilavē
